data.content: Tightened the selected-row queue summary wrapper so description and notes render in an inline two-column grid capped at 56.25% width, eliminating the oversized parent column and empty yellow space. Updated the queue layout regression test. Validated with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build. Branch: work/foolery-813a-parent-width Commit: 8069506bcc99.
